title: Supensour global config
description: ~/.supensour/config/supensour.yaml — platform catalog shared across supensour skills.

default.description: Key of the default platform when auto-detect is ambiguous.

platforms.description: Map of platform key → platform definition.

type.description: Platform family. Determines which platform-<type>.sh lib handles it.

host.description: Base URL, e.g. https://github.com or a self-hosted host.

api_version.description: Optional API version path segment (e.g. v4, rest/api/1.0).

token_env.description: Name of the env var holding the auth token.

token_env_alternatives.description: Fallback env var names tried if token_env is unset.

cli.description: Preferred CLI tool when available (e.g. gh).
